/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/motion_control.c.o CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/socket_comm.c.o CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/serial_comm.c.o CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/data_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/joystick.c.o CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/qmc5883p.c.o CMakeFiles/pi_services_handler.dir/src/pid_controller.c.o -o pi_services_handler  -lm
